title: Team Updates Widget Date Format
excerpt: I am using the Team Updates Widget, but my birthdates are pulling dd/mm so 20/07 BUT my settings for Monday have the dates as mm/dd (07/20). How do I fix the date format on this widget?

posts.author: askstratman (Angela Stratman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using the Team Updates Widget, but my birthdates are pulling dd/mm so 20/07 BUT my settings for Monday have the dates as mm/dd (07/20). How do I fix the date format on this widget?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Angela,

I am afraid at this time it isn’t currently possible to customise the date format in the widget - I apologise for the setback. I will take this feedback on board, and encourage you to submit this as a feature request
